category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Peru) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Peru Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Peru requirements: INACAL NTP / IEC 62133 cell safety, applicable Reglamento Tecnico certification, MTC radio approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与秘鲁要求对照：INACAL NTP/IEC 62133电芯安全、适用的技术规章（Reglamento Tecnico）认证、含无线功能产品的MTC无线电核准、UN 38.3运输及当地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與秘魯要求對照：INACAL NTP/IEC 62133電芯安全、適用的技術規章（Reglamento Tecnico）認證、含無線功能產品的MTC無線電核准、UN 38.3運輸及當地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Peru should meet IEC 62133-based safety (adopted as NTP by INACAL), comply with any applicable Reglamento Tecnico requiring certification, obtain MTC equipment homologation for wireless variants, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and ship through a Peru-established importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification alone. Peru has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS, or per-country EPR scheme.
answer_first.zh: 向秘鲁出口锂电池及移动电源的中国出口商应满足基于IEC 62133的安全要求（由INACAL采纳为NTP标准）、符合任何要求认证的适用技术规章（Reglamento Tecnico）、为无线型号取得MTC设备型号核准（homologacion）、持有有效的UN 38.3运输报告，并通过秘鲁当地进口商出货——上述要求均无法仅凭中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。秘鲁没有欧盟式横向电池法规、RoHS或逐国EPR制度。
answer_first.zht: 向秘魯出口鋰電池及行動電源的中國出口商應滿足基於IEC 62133的安全要求（由INACAL採納為NTP標準）、符合任何要求認證的適用技術規章（Reglamento Tecnico）、為無線型號取得MTC設備型號核准（homologacion）、持有有效的UN 38.3運輸報告，並透過秘魯當地進口商出貨——上述要求均無法僅憑中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。秘魯沒有歐盟式橫向電池法規、RoHS或逐國EPR制度。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (inacal.gob.pe, gob.pe, mtc.gob.pe, indecopi.gob.pe, iec.ch, unece.org). Local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
